headline: Airbnb upgraded by Truist on stronger 2026 outlook
summary: Investing.com -- Truist upgraded Airbnb to Hold from Sell in a note to clients on Thursday following 4Q25 earnings in the lodging and leisure sector, citing resilient travel demand and improved earnings projections.

headline: VFVA’s Deep Value Strategy Carries a Hidden Volatility Risk Most Investors Overlook
summary: Vanguard U.S. Value Factor ETF (BATS:VFVA) is built around an aggressive premise: find the cheapest U.S. stocks by screening across price-to-earnings, price-to-cash-flow, and balance sheet strength simultaneously. The fund holds 500+ individual positions and charges just 0.13% annually, making it one of the most cost-efficient ways to access deep value factor exposure. Investors buy it ... VFVA’s Deep Value Strategy Carries a Hidden Volatility Risk Most Investors Overlook

headline: How The MACOM (MTSI) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And AI Data Center Demand
summary: Analysts have been lifting price targets on MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, while one internal model keeps fair value steady at US$261.14. These moves reflect updated Street research, where higher targets are being tied to refreshed assumptions and a tighter read on how much risk and growth investors are willing to price in. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifts and keep up with the evolving MACOM story. Stay updated as the Fair Value for MACOM Technology Solutions...

headline: Wall Street Turns Less Bearish on Airbnb: Truist Raises Target to $129
summary: Truist upgraded Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB) to Hold from Sell on Thursday, raising its price target to $129 from $107, after revising its 2026 adjusted EBITDA and earnings estimates higher. The move is part of a broader sector reassessment following Q4 reports across the lodging and leisure space. With Airbnb shares trading at $133.88 on Thursday morning ... Wall Street Turns Less Bearish on Airbnb: Truist Raises Target to $129

headline: 7% Dividend Yield and Double-Digit Upside: Truist Suggests 2 Dividend Stocks to Buy
